forecast_source: IEM MEX (GFS extended MOS) daytime max n_x @00Z
caveats: MEX is a PROXY for the live NDFD/api.weather.gov gridpoint signal W1 uses, not the exact same forecast; shadow-forecast calibration (OD-9) is the eventual truth.
Observed = ASOS max_tmpf, a close but not identical proxy for the NWS Climatological Report high Kalshi settles on.
Shortest MEX max lead is ~36h, so σ here is a slightly conservative upper bound for W1's same-day (intraday) horizon.
Illustrative-only until corroborated by our own shadow forecasts.
